title: Combat Overhaul Resourcepack
description: Retextures most items that could be found in combat or regularly playing them game.
body: This texture pack is a WiP of textures and models i feel look better than vanilla. I made this purely for non-profit and sharing between friends or players who enjoy the style. Some items draw inspiration from other talented creators resource packs. For the people who like modifying textures slightly i have made and included a folder with a few mace textures i ended up not using but felt looked too good to never be used.
